top_signals.title: Japan’s Lawson convenience store pilots stablecoin payments with JPYC: report
top_signals.summary: This is part of a proof-of-concept involving telecommunications giant KDDI and crypto wallet firm HashPort.

top_signals.title: Businesses slam brakes on hiring over Burnham uncertainty
top_signals.summary: The UK’s lofty tax bill and concerns surrounding the direction of an Andy Burnham premiership have led to a subdued jobs market, new research suggests, as employers pause hiring whilst they wait for further clarity on the likely incoming Prime Minister’s tax policies. Available jobs in London slumped five per cent in the second quarter [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hogan Lovells looks to tap transatlantic dealmaking boom following merger
top_signals.summary: Global law firm Hogan Lovells’ is looking to grab more of the private capital market from rivals and tap into a boom in transatlantic dealmaking following its merger with the oldest legal practice on Wall Street, Cadwaledar, Wickersham & Taft. UK managing partner Penny Angell told City AM the merger creates “a stronger bench” for [...]

top_signals.title: Zelenskyy Cabinet shake-up puts Kyiv’s winter resilience in focus
top_signals.summary: Volodymyr Zelenskyy's move to overhaul his government is the latest sign of the Ukrainian president's determination to spare his nation a repeat of last winter's hardships.
